items.prompt: A SystemVerilog task in a testbench…
choices: May consume simulation time with delays or events
Must always return a value like a function
Is only legal inside always_comb blocks
Cannot drive signals on interface pins
items.explain: Tasks are procedural helpers that may wait; functions are zero-time.

items.prompt: A function differs from a task mainly because it…
choices: Runs in zero simulation time and returns a value
items.explain: Functions cannot use #delay or @event; they return a value.

items.prompt: Putting a #delay inside a function is legal SystemVerilog.
items.explain: Functions must complete in zero time; delays belong in tasks.

items.prompt: always_ff and always_comb are primarily for…
choices: Synthesizable RTL sequential and combinational logic
items.explain: Always blocks describe hardware; tasks describe TB procedures.

items.prompt: When you need to wait two clock edges then drive a pin, use…
items.explain: Waiting implies simulation time; tasks may consume time.
